text: The moon landing in 1969 was a real event, documented extensively by NASA, with physical evidence including moon rocks brought back to Earth.
Extensive medical research has consistently shown that there is no link between vaccines and autism.
The Earth is roughly spherical (an oblate spheroid), a fact confirmed by centuries of scientific observation and images from space.
Gargling with warm water and salt or drinking hot water does not prevent, treat, or cure COVID-19 or any other coronavirus.
There is no scientific evidence of cities, artificial structures, or advanced civilizations on Mars. NASA rovers have only explored barren geological landscapes.
Dell Technologies officially released a sustainability report stating their goal to recycle 1 billion tech products globally and achieve zero greenhouse gas emissions by 2030.
Consuming alkaline water does not change the pH level of human blood, which is strictly regulated by the lungs and kidneys.
There is no scientific evidence that mobile phone 5G signals interfere with human immune systems or spread viruses.
The Indian economy became the world's 5th largest economy by nominal GDP in 2022, overtaking the UK.
Generative AI models like Gemini can experience hallucinations, where they generate confident but factually incorrect information.
The James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) is located at the second Lagrange point (L2), approximately 1.5 million km from Earth.
Vitamin C can support immune function but does not prevent or cure the common cold once symptoms have started.
Pluto was reclassified as a dwarf planet by the IAU in 2006 because it has not cleared the neighborhood around its orbit.
End-to-end encryption ensures that only the sender and receiver can read messages; service providers cannot access the content.
The Great Wall of China is not visible to the naked eye from the moon, though it can be seen from low Earth orbit.
Electric vehicles (EVs) generally have a lower lifetime carbon footprint than internal combustion engine vehicles, even accounting for battery production.
The Unified Payments Interface (UPI) is a real-time payment system developed in India that facilitates instantaneous inter-bank peer-to-peer and person-to-merchant transactions.
Chandrayaan-3 successfully soft-landed on the Moon's south pole in August 2023, making India the first country to achieve this feat.
Human fingerprints are uniquely shaped by environmental factors in the womb, meaning even identical twins have completely different fingerprints.
Eating carrots can support overall eye health, but it does not magically give humans enhanced night vision.
Antibiotics are only effective against bacterial infections and have zero impact on illnesses caused by viruses, such as the flu or COVID-19.
The Moon is tidally locked to Earth, meaning we always see the same side. However, the 'dark side' is a myth, as all sides receive equal sunlight over a lunar month.
A single Bitcoin transaction can consume thousands of times more energy than a standard credit card transaction, primarily due to the Proof-of-Work consensus mechanism.
Placing a wet smartphone in a bag of uncooked rice is less effective for drying it out than simply leaving it in an open area with good airflow.
Sharks do not lack the ability to get cancer; marine biologists have documented tumors and cancers in several species of sharks.
Goldfish have a memory span of several months, not three seconds, and can be trained to recognize shapes, colors, and sounds.
